classes.name: spectranormalizer.normalizer.SpectraNormalizer

methods.name: spectranormalizer.normalizer.SpectraNormalizer.is_valid_spectra
documentation: Used to check that a spectra has all required information for normalization.

Normalizer for Spectra in run.calculation with the following responsibilities:

- Sets provenance method section.
- Normalizes intensities to their maximum value.
